name: Gettysburg / Battlefield KOA Holiday
summary_text: A wooded KOA Holiday just minutes from Gettysburg National Military Park offering full-hookup RV sites, family amenities, and an ideal basecamp for exploring one of America's most historic battlefields.

siteFeatures.level: Mostly level wooded sites with pull-through and back-in options.
otherNotes: Mature trees provide a peaceful campground atmosphere.
Located only a few minutes from Gettysburg National Military Park.

starlink.notes: Tree cover varies throughout the campground. Some sites have good openings while others are more obstructed.

petNotes.walkingAreas: Quiet campground roads and wooded areas make for enjoyable dog walks.
petNotes.dogFriendlyTrails: Many trails throughout Gettysburg National Military Park allow leashed pets.
petNotes.hazards: Ticks are common in wooded areas—check pets after hiking.
petNotes.notes: Gettysburg is a wonderful destination for traveling with dogs thanks to the many pet-friendly outdoor historic areas.

tripTips: Spend at least a full day exploring Gettysburg National Military Park.
Arrive early if you want to tour the battlefield before the crowds.
Bring bicycles if you'd like another way to explore portions of the battlefield.
Check pets carefully for ticks after hiking.
Reserve early during summer and anniversary events.
